dungeon: (MULTI-DUNGEON STREAM, player Syogeo) ROTF — Crystal Prisoner Clone taunt + class/death-screen + Pirate Cave
source: video disc_LuUwzl6KwCY (232 frames, 3 transitions, 58 chat). Opens on ROTF title; shows death screens + several biomes. Chat captured a boss taunt + event feed.
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: orange/lava-brick dungeon, green grass realm, a 'Pirate' entry (Pirate Cave), dark space arenas with diamond/crystal projectiles (a crystal/space boss). Death screens shown for the player.

bosses.name: Crystal Prisoner Clone
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat, repeated). A CLONE-CONFUSION mechanic — the Crystal Prisoner spawns multiple CLONES all taunting 'I am everywhere and nowhere!' (players must find/kill the real one among decoys). Dark space-y arena with diamond/crystal projectiles.

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God
taunts: You are food for my minions!

drops: Stem of the brain (player trade item — 'B>Stem of the brain')
mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) Crystal Prisoner CLONE mechanic ('I am everywhere and nowhere!' — decoy clones, find the real). (2) CLASSES confirmed present: death screens read 'Syogeo, Level 20 Mystic' and 'Syogeo, Level 20 Priest' (Mystic + Priest classes), 'killed on March 4, 2019' (server active 2019). (3) 'Pirate' dungeon entry = Pirate Cave. (4) Client X3.0; MOTD 'Welcome to Realm of the Mad God'; WASDQE controls. (5) 'Legends' leaderboard + a stats/graphs panel seen.
uncertain: Crystal Prisoner Clone's parent dungeon (Crystal Cavern?) not entered/named here. Boss attacks/HP/drops not isolated. Death-screen killer names not fully legible. 'Stem of the brain' is a trade mention (stats unknown).
confidence: HIGH for the Crystal Prisoner Clone taunt (verbatim) + the Mystic/Priest class death screens + Riverborn event + client X3.0. LOW for dungeon mapping and item stats.
